subcodes.title: Words spoken at Rue St. Didier 30 in Paris, 1913-02-16
subcodes.first_line: He related the story of a judge of Acca, a priest of an Orthodox sect and Muhammad 'Ali. The judge was the Master's friend
subcodes.first_line_orig: مطران کشیش نصاری پیش من آمد و گفت که میرزا محمد علی مرا ملاقات کرد
subcodes.subjects: @alcohol and drugs; tobacco; opium, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Ottoman commissions of investigation, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
